content: Tailwind mobile overflow patterns: overflow-x-hidden on body/container prevents horizontal scroll. All dashboard pages use mx-auto with max-w constraints (max-w-2xl to max-w-5xl) and px-4 padding — these should be safe on mobile. The header (h-12 flex items-center justify-between) with NavLinks (5 items in gap-4) will overflow at ~320-375px. The overview page stat grid uses grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 — safe. The machine-grid already has responsive grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3. Primary mobile concern: nav link overflow in header, table-like content in device detail page.
